title: The Industrial Development Bank (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 2003
full_text: The Industrial Development Bank (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 2003 औद्योगिक विकास बैंक (उपक्रम का अंतरण और निरसन) अधिनियम,2003 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200353 Act Number: 53 Enactment Date: 2003-12-30 Act Year: 2003 Short Title: The Industrial Development Bank (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 2003 Hindi Title: औद्योगिक विकास बैंक (उपक्रम का अंतरण और निरसन) अधिनियम,2003 Long Title: An Act to provide for the transfer and vesting of the undertaking of the Industrial Development Bank of India to, and in, the Company to be formed and registered as a Company under the Companies Act, 1956 to carry on banking business and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto and also to repeal the Industrial Development Bank of India Act, 1964. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 02-07-2004 Notification: 2nd July, 2004, vide notification No. S.O. 769(E) dated 2nd July, 2004, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Industrial Development Bank (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 2003 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II TRANSFER AND VESTING OF THE UNDERTAKING OF DEVELOPMENT BANK IN COMPANY CHAPTER III MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Undertaking of Development Bank to vest in Company. Section 4. General effect of transfer and vesting of undertaking. Section 5. Provisions in respect of officers and other employees of Development Bank. Section 6. Concession, etc., to be deemed to have been granted to Company. Section 7. Tax exemption or benefit to continue to have effect. Section 8. Guarantee to be operative. Section 9. Shares, bonds and debentures to be deemed to be approved securities. Section 10. Act to have overriding effect. Section 11. Application of other laws not barred. Section 12. Amendment to certain enactments. Section 13. Substitution in Acts, rules, regulations or notifications by Company in place of Development Bank. Section 14. Power to remove difficulties. Section 15. Repeal and saving of Act 18 of 1964.
